title: AssumptionVerifierPlanAudit
description: Output schema for the AssumptionVerifier adversarial mirage detector. Validates plan claims against codebase reality using 17 systematic mirage patterns.

trace_id.description: Optional UUIDv4 for cross-agent trace correlation.

status.description: COMPLETE: mirage scan finished with findings. ABSTAIN: insufficient evidence to evaluate.

confidence.description: Confidence in the audit. Below 0.7 triggers automatic ABSTAIN.

mirage_findings.description: List of detected mirages. Each finding maps to one of the 17 mirage patterns.

pattern_id.description: 1-17 corresponding to the mirage pattern catalog.

classification.description: Patterns 1-10 are presence mirages (false positives). Patterns 11-17 are absence mirages (false negatives).

claim.description: The specific claim or assumption being evaluated.

evidence.description: Evidence supporting the verdict — file paths, actual code, or documentation references.

verdict.description: VERIFIED: claim confirmed true. UNVERIFIED: could not confirm. MIRAGE: claim confirmed false.

regression_iteration.description: Iteration index from which this mirage regressed. Set when a previously-verified mirage item recurs in a later plan iteration.

regression_finding_id.description: Finding ID from a prior mirage scan iteration this finding marks as regressed.

scoring.description: Quantitative scoring across 5 dimensions, each scored 0-5. Total max: 25.

formula.description: Human-readable formula showing how the score was calculated.

recommendation.description: Concise recommendation for Orchestrator: proceed, investigate specific mirages, or revise plan.

failure_classification.description: Required when mirages with BLOCKING severity are found or when the model was unavailable. Note: 'transient' is excluded — read-only reviewers do not have a flake retry semantic. 'model_unavailable' is admitted because it substitutes the model (not the prompt) and therefore does not violate the transient-exclusion rationale. model_unavailable: the model assigned to this verifier was not reachable; retry with an available model.
